overall.description: A cinematic train ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling on the NCART metro system between stations on a foggy, rain-soaked night. The journey passes neon-lit skyscrapers, industrial districts, and coastal views before arriving at the destination station.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro tracks through downtown canyon

events.description: train passes through narrow building corridor temporarily blocking view of city

agents.ego_description: traveling on elevated NCART train through foggy downtown Night City, viewing neon billboards and skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated red and blue DTR signage on multiple sides
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and interior lights
tight passage between concrete buildings with windows visible
cluster of illuminated advertisements including Bottoms Up and Get a Job signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated train traveling through a foggy cyberpunk downtown. The DTR billboard building dominates the skyline initially, while the train passes through a narrow building corridor midway. Neon signs and glass skyscrapers line the route as the train approaches Glen Station.

events.description: train decelerates significantly approaching the station platform
train comes to a complete stop at Glen Station platform

agents.ego_description: stopped at Glen Station platform waiting for departure

notable_agents.action: standing on platform near the station sign waiting for the train

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign reading GLEN above the platform
concrete platform with yellow safety lines and benches
overhead shelter structure covering the platform

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Glen Station, slowing to a stop under the station's roof structure. The platform is sparsely populated with waiting passengers. The DTR billboard and downtown buildings fade from view as the train docks at the concrete platform.

events.description: passing close to red water tower structure temporarily filling the frame

agents.ego_description: departing Glen Station and accelerating through the industrial area of the city

entered.detail: large cylindrical water tank on metal stilts painted red with warning lights
low-rise brick and concrete industrial buildings with few windows
elevated roadway structure with vehicle lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Departing Glen Station, the train accelerates through an industrial district characterized by warehouses and a prominent red water tower. The train passes close to the water tower structure before it recedes into the left background, with highway overpasses visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal elevated metro line with ocean view

events.description: city view opens up to reveal the dark ocean and coastline
passing extremely close to large red Arasaka tower structure

agents.ego_description: traveling along the waterfront with expansive views of the ocean and distant city lights

entered.detail: dark water visible beyond the city with distant lights on the horizon
massive red and black corporate skyscraper with illuminated windows
structure with red aviation warning lights blinking in the fog

segments.scene_description: The train travels along the coastline, revealing the ocean to the right and the massive Arasaka tower to the left. Red warning lights blink atop industrial structures in the fog. The segment features open waterfront views before the train passes close to the towering Arasaka building.

events.description: train slows down approaching Wellsprings station
train comes to a final stop at the platform

agents.ego_description: arriving at Wellsprings NCART station with passengers visible walking on the platform

notable_agents.action: walking toward the station entrance from the platform
standing near the ticket machines on the platform

entered.detail: illuminated blue and white NCART logo sign above the station entrance
modern station structure with glass doors and teal accent lighting
orange seating arranged along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at the final destination, Wellsprings NCART station, slowing to a stop at the platform. Passengers are visible walking toward the entrance. The station features prominent NCART branding, teal accent lighting, and modern architecture, marking the end of the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey on an elevated train that transitions from a dense, neon-lit downtown core through an industrial wasteland toward a modern coastal station. It begins by gliding past the towering DTR billboard and through narrow corridors of glass skyscrapers before slowing to a stop at the sparsely populated Glen Station. As the train departs and accelerates, the urban skyline gives way to a gritty industrial district defined by warehouses and a prominent red water tower. The scene then opens up to a foggy coastline where the ocean stretches to the right and the massive Arasaka tower looms to the left under blinking red warning lights. Finally, the camera follows the train as it decelerates into Wellsprings NCART station, shifting into a space of teal accent lighting and modern architecture.
